title: Pattern Schema (the work contract)
description: A pattern is the CONTRACT: the arrangement of lugs (holes) on a wheel as a versioned, verifiable checklist of deliverables. Each item is a lug + how it is verified. A pattern carries preconditions (what must hold to start) and provenance (the inputs that manifested it — the versioned DNA of self-evolution). Closing a pattern (at savepoint or closeout) runs each item's verification and emits a bolt: certified when every item passes, partial when closed early. No bolt until the pattern checks out true. Stored mirroring lugs: WAI-Spoke/patterns/bytype/pattern/{lifecycle_state}/{id}.json with a generated WAI-PatternIndex.jsonl.

version.description: semver; a new version supersedes the prior (provenance.derived_from links back)

items.description: The checklist: one entry per lug (hole) in the pattern

verify.description: How this item is certified non-hallucinated

mode.description: mechanical: runnable assertion; attested: named AI verifier signs; human: Mario signs

assertion.description: For mode=mechanical: the runnable check (command / test / schema-validation) that must pass

verifier.description: For mode=attested: the named verifier role/agent expected to sign (e.g. lug-reviewer)

result.description: Filled when the item is verified at pattern close

status.description: pending until verified; verified on pass; failed on a failed check

preconditions.description: Assertions that must hold before the pattern may be started/actioned (state + inputs available)

provenance.description: The inputs that manifested this pattern — the versioned DNA, replayable

derived_from.description: prior pattern version this evolved from

state_hash.description: hash/sha of relevant state at authoring

lifecycle_state.description: draft -> active (on first lease) -> certified (all items pass) | failed (any item fails) | superseded (new version)

bolt_id.description: The certification bolt emitted when this pattern closed
